scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd packages/elysia-adapter build && bun run --cwd packages/citty-adapter build && bun run --cwd packages/croner-adapter build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/core typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/elysia-adapter typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/citty-adapter typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/croner-adapter typecheck && bun run --cwd example typecheck
scripts.test: bun test packages/core/src packages/elysia-adapter/src packages/citty-adapter/src packages/croner-adapter/src example/src
scripts.release:check: bun run generate:example && bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build
scripts.release:dry-run: bun run release:check && bun run scripts/publish-packages.ts --dry-run
scripts.release:publish: bun run release:check && bun run scripts/publish-packages.ts
